title: stelis brevilabris
intro: Stelis brevilabris, also known as the short-lipped stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis brevilabris include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Stelis brevilabris can be made by infusing the roots and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the plant material for use in capsules or tinctures.
